description: Refactor EmailPilot and MeetingPilot to extend IntelligentAgent with real LLM-driven logic. EmailPilot uses AI for triage classification and reply generation (no more regex). MeetingPilot uses AI for transcript->action-item extraction.
steps: Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/email-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent instead of WorkerAgent. Constructor accepts AIEnginePort + TypedToolRegistry + SpendingLimit. Remove hardcoded needsReply() regex logic. Replace with AI-based triage: call aiEngine.classify(email.body, ['needs_reply', 'spam', 'informational', 'urgent']) for each email. Replace generateReplyDraft() with AI-based composition: call aiEngine.infer() with system prompt instructing to match user's writing style. Register email-specific tools in the tool registry: 'email.archive', 'email.draft_reply', 'email.flag', 'email.schedule_send'. Keep EmailItem and EmailProcessingResult interfaces stable for backward compat.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/meeting-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Replace hardcoded generateNotes() with AI-driven extraction: call aiEngine.infer() with transcript/agenda to extract action items, decisions, and summary. Replace generatePrepNotes() with AI-generated prep. Register meeting-specific tools: 'meeting.summarize_transcript', 'meeting.extract_actions', 'meeting.create_task', 'meeting.notify_assignee'. Keep Meeting, MeetingNotes, ActionItem, MeetingResult interfaces stable.

Update packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/agents/email-pilot.test.ts to work with new IntelligentAgent-based EmailPilot. Mock the AIEnginePort to return predictable classification/reply results. Test: (1) AI classifies spam correctly, (2) AI generates reply for needs_reply emails, (3) spending limit blocks when budget exhausted, (4) reasoning trace is populated after execution.

Update packages/agent-runtime/src/__tests__/agents/meeting-pilot.test.ts similarly. Mock AI to return structured action items from transcript. Test: (1) action items extracted via AI, (2) tool registry is used for task creation, (3) trace shows planning steps.
acceptance_criteria: EmailPilot and MeetingPilot extend IntelligentAgent, not WorkerAgent directly
No regex-based classification remains in EmailPilot
No hardcoded template strings remain in reply generation
AI engine mock is called during test execution (verified via mock call counts)
All existing test assertions that verify behavior (archives spam, drafts replies, etc) still pass with mocked AI
Both pilots register their domain-specific tools in TypedToolRegistry
